🚩 3 Red Flags to Watch for When Hiring a Cleaning Service

Before you hand anyone your house key — read this first.

We built The Valley Clean Team on trust. And trust starts with transparency. Here are the 3 biggest warning signs that a cleaning company doesn't deserve to step foot in your home:

🚩 Red Flag #1: The 4-Hour Window
If they say "We'll be there between 1–5 PM" — run. Your time matters. We show up when we say we will, period.

🚩 Red Flag #2: No Proof of Insurance
A company that can't show you a certificate of insurance on request is a liability waiting to happen. We are fully bonded and insured — always.

🚩 Red Flag #3: No Fixed Pricing
If they won't give you a firm quote before they walk in the door, you're setting yourself up for sticker shock. We believe in radical price transparency.

You deserve a cleaning company you can actually trust. Veteran-owned. Women-owned. Community trusted.

🧹 Deep Clean vs. Regular Clean: What's Actually the Difference?

We get this question every week. And it matters — because booking the wrong service is one of the most common (and costly) mistakes homeowners make.

Here's the short version:

🔵 Regular Cleaning = maintenance
Think: wiping surfaces, vacuuming, mopping, cleaning bathrooms and kitchens on the surface. Great for homes already in good shape.

🔴 Deep Cleaning = restoration
Think: inside appliances, baseboards, grout lines, light fixtures, window tracks, behind furniture. Takes 2–3x longer. Costs more. Worth every penny when needed.

When do you NEED a deep clean?
→ First-time service with any cleaner
→ After a major event or renovation
→ Seasonal reset (spring cleaning, post-holiday)
→ Move-in / move-out situations

Pro tip: Start with a deep clean, then maintain with regular visits. It's always cheaper in the long run.

👉 Read the full comparison guide: https://thevalleycleanteam.com/blog/deep-cleaning-vs-regular-cleaning
